data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — CLAUDE.md has no Playwright MCP/browser_run_code/browser_snapshot refs; CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md has playwright_debug_reference config key and playwright test command but no MCP patterns; INSTALL.md has playwright listed as optional dependency but no MCP setup; no .playwright-mcp directory exists. Tests should assert CLI patterns exist and MCP patterns are absent.
